title: Group Booking Proposal Template for Hotels in Egypt
body_template:
Group Booking Proposal

For {{group_name}}

Dear {{contact_name}},

We are delighted to present our proposal for hosting your group at our hotel. Below are the details of the offer:

  • Hotel Name: {{hotel_name}}
  • Check-in Date: {{check_in_date}}
  • Check-out Date: {{check_out_date}}
  • Total Room Nights: {{room_nights}}
  • Room Types: {{room_types}}
  • ADR (Average Daily Rate): {{adr}}
  • F&B Options: {{fnb_options}}
  • Additional Services: {{additional_services}}

We are committed to providing an exceptional experience for your group, ensuring comfort and satisfaction throughout their stay. Please let us know if you have any specific requirements or if there are any adjustments needed to this proposal.

Looking forward to welcoming your group to our hotel.

Best regards,

{{sender_name}}

{{hotel_contact_info}}

Thank you for considering our hotel for your group booking.

variables.name: group_name
variables.description: Name of the group making the booking

variables.name: contact_name
variables.description: Name of the contact person for the group

variables.name: hotel_name
variables.description: Name of the hotel offering the proposal

variables.name: room_nights
variables.description: Total number of room nights booked

variables.name: room_types
variables.description: Types of rooms offered in the proposal

variables.name: adr
variables.description: Average Daily Rate for the rooms

variables.name: fnb_options
variables.description: Food and Beverage options included in the proposal

variables.name: additional_services
variables.description: Any additional services or amenities offered

variables.name: sender_name
variables.description: Name of the person sending the proposal

description: A template for creating group booking proposals tailored for hotels in Egypt, focusing on providing detailed offers to potential group clients.
